subcodes.first_line: O ye who survive those two sacred and blessed souls! Your letter was received, and from its contents it was clear and evident that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بازماندگان دو نفس مقدس مبارک نامه شما رسید از مضامین واضح و مبرهن بود که
